regimens.clue: runny nose / sneezing / itchy nose
regimens.when: uncomplicated outpatient rhinitis
regimens.avoid: fever, focal sinus pain, or red flags present
regimens.red: Needs in-person eval today if dyspnea, facial swelling, high fever, or severe sinus pain

meds.ca: daily use; slower onset over days
avoid taking with fruit juice close to dose

regimens.dn: Acute viral URI with productive cough
regimens.clue: wet cough / sputum without bacterial features
regimens.when: uncomplicated URI with sputum
regimens.avoid: SOB, chest pain, or pneumonia concern
regimens.red: Avoid routine antibiotics; Needs in-person eval today if dyspnea, chest pain, or persistent high fever

meds.ca: avoid duplicate paracetamol; caution liver disease

regimens.dn: Acute viral URI with acute infectious diarrhea
regimens.clue: URI symptoms plus non-bloody diarrhea
regimens.when: uncomplicated mixed viral syndrome
regimens.avoid: bloody stool, dehydration, or severe abdominal pain
regimens.red: Avoid routine antibiotics; Needs in-person eval today if dehydration, bloody stool, dyspnea, or severe abdominal pain

meds.ca: avoid duplicate paracetamol; caution liver disease

meds.dn: Cera ORS รสส้ม [Glucose Anhydrous 3 g.+Sodium Chloride 0.53 g.+Potassium Chloride 0.23 g.+Sodium Citrate Dihydrate 0.44 g.]
meds.order: 1 sachet in 150 mL water; sip frequently / after each loose stool

meds.ca: assess bloody stool/high fever before simple OPD treatment
avoid if bloody stool/high fever; assess dehydration

regimens.clue: watery stool without dysentery
regimens.when: simple acute watery diarrhea outpatient case
regimens.avoid: bloody stool, high fever, or severe pain
regimens.red: Needs in-person eval today if dehydration, bloody stool, severe abdominal pain, or persistent vomiting
